top_signals.title: Billions in SpaceX IPO Arb Trades Rattle ETFs
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Denitsa Tsekova joins Scarlet Fu and Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." A series of unusual multibillion-dollar flows has rippled through the ETF market in the past week, suggesting some major investors used a contentious method to get exposure to the IPO of SpaceX. At least one fund manager placed temporary restrictions on its product in a bid to curb the practice. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
